en: If your company performs any of the following services and is required to maintain the relevant certification(s) for those services, you will be asked to provide your certificate in a subsequent form.
Mexico Special Permit for the Transport of Hazardous Materials and Wastes Applicability Assessment

This permit is an official authorization required for companies or individuals to transport hazardous materials and wastes within Mexico by land, air, or sea. It ensures that only qualified carriers, using compliant equipment and procedures, are allowed to handle and move dangerous goods, thereby protecting public safety and the environment.

To obtain the certificate, companies can file an application with the SICT (and SEMARNAT for hazardous wastes), including company identification, operational details, and required supporting documents.

Regulation for the Land Transport of Hazardous Materials and Wastes
